testsuite.name: Milestone3Test

testcase.name: getMainOutput()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <stores.HashMap@2f2c9b19> but was: <Adding programming under key cs118 at location 4 Adding data structure under key cs126 at location 0 Adding mathematical programming under key ib104 at location 3 Adding sets and numbers under key ma138 at location 7 Adding calculus 1 under key ma142 at location 10 Adding calculus 2 under key ma143 at location 0 Adding vectors and matrices under key ma148 at location 5 Adding refresher under key ma1k2 at location 10 Adding statistical modelling under key st117 at location 9 Adding probability 1 under key st118 at location 10 Adding probability 2 under key st119 at location 0 Adding pyhsic under key as826 at location 7 Adding chem under key af156 at location 0 Adding bio under key gr157 at location 1 Adding engineering under key t2091 at location 10 Adding tennis under key hk145 at location 7 Adding korean under key so104 at location 4 Adding english under key ho194 at location 8 Adding grammar under key oj132 at location 5 Adding economic under key sf182 at location 3 stores.HashMap@7d3e8655>
